nativeSnippet: ) => entries.map(([name]) => name) as unknown as readonly [Entries[0][0], ...Array<Entries[number][0]>];
note: `entries` is a readonly non-empty tuple (generic `Entries`); the cast back to a literal tuple type may need to be preserved when switching to A.map.

`characters` is built via `A.fromIterable`; native index `characters[index]` with `?? ""` fallback maps to `pipe(A.get(characters, index), O.getOrElse(() => ""))`. Inside an imperative index-based for-loop.

`characters` is built via `A.fromIterable`; native index `characters[index + 1]` with `?? ""` fallback maps to `pipe(A.get(characters, index + 1), O.getOrElse(() => ""))`. Inside an imperative index-based for-loop.
